channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FINOPB] RBI Approves Ketan Merchant as Interim CEO of Fino Payments Bank Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fino Payments Bank Ltd has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) for the appointment of Mr. Ketan Merchant as the Interim Chief Executive Officer (CEO) for a period of three months starting from February 27, 2026. The appointment will continue until Mr. Rishi Gupta resumes his duties, following a reassessment of his fit and proper status by the NRC and Board, and a decision by the RBI. This change is in compliance with the SEBI Listing Regulations and the Bank's internal policies.

  • RBI approves Ketan Merchant as Interim CEO of Fino Payments Bank Ltd
  • Appointment for a period of three months starting from February 27, 2026
  • Continuation until Rishi Gupta resumes his duties post reassessment
  • In compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations and the Bank's internal policies
  • Decision awaited from RBI post reassessment of Rishi Gupta's status

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fino Payments Bank Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [J&KBANK] Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd Announces Elevation of Two Senior Management Personnel
item.description:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd has announced the elevation of two of its senior management personnel, Mr. Ashutosh Sareen and Mr. Rajesh Malla Tickoo, from the position of General Managers to Chief General Managers with effect from 06 March, 2026. Both individuals have been associated with the bank since 1989 and have handled critical assignments at operational and administrative levels. Mr. Sareen is a Commerce graduate with a law degree, while Mr. Tickoo holds a Bachelor’s degree in Science.

  • Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd announces the elevation of two senior management personnel.
  • Mr. Ashutosh Sareen and Mr. Rajesh Malla Tickoo are elevated from General Managers to Chief General Managers.
  • Both individuals have been associated with the bank since 1989.
  • Mr. Sareen is a Commerce graduate with a law degree, while Mr. Tickoo holds a Bachelor’s degree in Science.
  • The appointments are effective from 06 March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAMMU & KASHMIR BANK LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [TIL] TIL Ltd to Convene Rights Issue Committee Meeting Tomorrow
item.description:
TIL Ltd has announced that the Rights Issue Committee meeting of the company, which was earlier postponed due to pending In-principle approval from the Stock Exchanges, will now be held tomorrow, i.e., Sunday, March 08, 2026. The agenda includes fixing the record date, issue price, entitlement ratio, and other matters related to the proposed Rights Issue.

  • Rights Issue Committee meeting of TIL Ltd to be held tomorrow
  • Meeting was earlier postponed due to pending In-principle approval from the Stock Exchanges
  • Agenda includes fixing the record date, issue price, and entitlement ratio for the proposed Rights Issue

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIL LTD. | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [ELITECON] Elitecon International Ltd Announces Q3 & 9M FY2025 Financial Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Elitecon International Ltd has announced its un-audited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The results were considered and approved by the Board of Directors in a meeting held on March 07, 2026. The meeting commenced at 08:30 P.M and concluded at 09:45 P.M. The financial results are prepared in terms of Regulation 33 of the Listing Regulations, accompanied by Limited Review Reports of the Statutory Auditor.

  • Elitecon International Ltd announced its un-audited financial results for Q3 and 9M FY2025.
  • The announcement was made following the approval of the Board of Directors.
  • The Board meeting was held on March 07, 2026, from 08:30 P.M to 09:45 P.M.
  • The financial results are prepared according to Regulation 33 of the Listing Regulations.
  • The results are accompanied by Limited Review Reports of the Statutory Auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Elitecon International Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KPIGREEN] KPI Green Energy Subsidiary Executes Battery Energy Storage Purchase Agreement with 445 MW Capacity
item.description:
🔥 Trending

KPI Green Energy Limited has informed the exchange that its subsidiary, Sun Drops Energia Limited, has executed the Battery Energy Storage Purchase Agreement (BESPA) with Gujarat Urja Vikas Nigam Limited (GUVNL) for the development of self-owned IPP Standalone Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Projects with an aggregate capacity of 445 MW / 890 MWh. The BESPA has been executed pursuant to the tariff-based competitive bidding process conducted by GUVNL for procurement of Standalone BESS capacity under Phase-VII, supported by Viability Gap Funding (VGF) through the Power System Development Fund (PSDF). This agreement marks a significant milestone for the Group as it formally progresses into the implementation phase of its first utility-scale IPP Battery Energy Storage System project.

  • KPI Green Energy subsidiary, Sun Drops Energia Limited, executes BESPA with GUVNL for 445 MW / 890 MWh BESS Projects
  • Execution pursuant to tariff-based competitive bidding process under Phase-VII with VGF support
  • Project to strengthen the Group's presence in renewable energy ecosystem
  • First utility-scale IPP Battery Energy Storage System project for the Group
  • Significant milestone in the implementation phase

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KPI Green Energy Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PNGSREVA] PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd Board Meeting on March 13, 2026, to Approve Q4 2025 Financial Results
item.description:
PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd, formerly known as Gadgil Metals & Commodities, has announced that a Board Meeting will be held on March 13, 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the Unaudited Financial Results of the Company for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. This is in accordance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd Board Meeting scheduled for March 13, 2026
  • Meeting to consider and approve Unaudited Financial Results for Q4 2025
  • Announcement in accordance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ELITECON] Elitecon International Ltd Announces Q3 and Nine Months Results for 2025
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Elitecon International Ltd, in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has announced the un-audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The results were approved at a Board meeting held on March 07, 2026, from 08:30 P.M to 09:45 P.M. The meeting concluded with the review and approval of the financial results.

  • Elitecon International Ltd has announced the un-audited Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025.
  • The announcement was made in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The Board meeting to discuss the financial results took place from 08:30 P.M to 09:45 P.M on March 07, 2026.
  • The financial results were prepared in terms of Regulation 33 of the Listing Regulations.
  • The announcement includes Limited Review Reports of the Statutory Auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Elitecon International Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JCTLTD] JCT Ltd's Tenth COC Meeting Concludes with Commercial Negotiations
item.description:
The Tenth (10%) meeting of the Committee of Creditors (CoC) of J C T Limited was held on 26th February 2026 through video conferencing. This meeting marked the first round of commercial negotiations between CoC Members and Resolution Applicants. The outcome of the meeting is an important step in the resolution process of JCT Ltd.

  • Tenth meeting of JCT Ltd's CoC held on 26th February 2026
  • First round of commercial negotiations took place between CoC Members and Resolution Applicants
  • Meeting held through video conferencing

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JCT LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PNGSREVA] PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd Announces Authorized Persons for Materiality Determination and Disclosure
item.description:
PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd has announced the Key Managerial Personnel who are authorized for determining materiality of an event or information and for making disclosure to the Stock Exchanges. The authorized persons include Mr. Amit Yeshwant Modak, Whole Time Director and CEO; Mr. Aditya Amit Modak, Non-Executive Director; Mr. Kisan Maruti Shendkar, Chief Financial Officer; and Ms. Kirti Vaidya, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

  • PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd has announced the Key Managerial Personnel for determining materiality and disclosure.
  • The authorized persons include Mr. Amit Yeshwant Modak, Whole Time Director and CEO, Mr. Aditya Amit Modak, Non-Executive Director, Mr. Kisan Maruti Shendkar, Chief Financial Officer, and Ms. Kirti Vaidya, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BARONINF] Baron Infotech Ltd Enters Lease Agreement for Corporate Office with M/s Unilegal
item.description:
Baron Infotech Limited (CD) has entered into a Lease Agreement with M/s Unilegal for the premises situated at Flat No 401, Esteem Diamond Building, near Sai Baba temple road, Dawarakapuri, Panajgutta, Hyderabad, Telangana — 800082. This premises is currently being utilized as the Corporate Office of the Corporate Debtor. This submission is being made for information and record. The lease agreement is valid from 27/11/2025 to 31/12/2026.

  • Baron Infotech Ltd has entered into a Lease Agreement with M/s Unilegal
  • The lease is for the premises situated at Flat No 401, Esteem Diamond Building, Hyderabad
  • The premises are currently being utilized as the Corporate Office of the Corporate Debtor
  • The lease agreement is valid from 27/11/2025 to 31/12/2026
  • The submission is being made for information and record

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BARON INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures
